sections.paragraph:
verb לעלות

to go up, ascend, climb; rise; grow; flourish; go up; be better than, excel; cost; immigrate (to Israel), make aliyah

verb להתעלות

to excel, be better than; rise above

verb להתעלות

to boast; be elated

verb להעלות

raise, lift; come up with, suggest; (Computers) upload; promote; grow; sacrifice; make immigrate, cause to make aliyah

verb הועלה

be raised; be promoted; grown; sacrificed; be brought (to Israel) on aliyah

preposition

on, upon, above, over, about, on top, atop, of, onto, at

super-, supra-
